title: Silky Fresh Spanish Bamboo Shoot Soup
description: A light, silky broth infused with fresh bamboo shoots, pickled green peppers, and aromatic herbs, perfect for a cozy Spanish-inspired vegetarian meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion, minced garlic, sliced celery, and julienned carrot; sauté for 3-4 minutes until vegetables soften.
Stir in sliced bamboo shoots and diced pickled peppers, cooking for another 2 minutes to release flavors.
Pour in low-sodium vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and let simmer for 15 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, and simmer for another 5 minutes for a silky texture.
Stir in chopped fresh parsley and remove from heat.
Let the soup sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a drizzle of extra olive oil or a sprinkle of paprika.
Enjoy the comforting, silky freshness of this Spanish-inspired soup.
